title: Cuphonotus humistratus
taxonomy: Cuphonotus humistratus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. The genus Cuphonotus belongs to the order Boraginales. This plant is native to South Africa. It is also known by other names such as Cape sundew and sticky cup. Cuphonotus humistratus is a carnivorous plant that obtains nutrients by capturing and digesting insects.
